update_reason: New intelligence: G3 storm March 20-22 preceded both PRED-SR-SUPPRESS (March 23) and PRED-093 (April 4) registration. Author had 13 days of Schumann data from G3 storm before registering PRED-093.
reasoning: TIMING UPDATE: Same G3 (Strong) storm context as PRED-SR-SUPPRESS update. The March 20-22 G3 event occurred 13 days before PRED-093 registration (April 4), giving the author even more time to analyze Schumann response data from that storm than for PRED-SR-SUPPRESS (1-3 days). The cryptographic hash (54939640) proves content integrity at registration time but does not prove the author had not already observed the Schumann-storm relationship from March 20-22 data. This is a pattern consistent with the broader post-hoc concern (~93% of dome WINs are retrodictions): observe the effect, then register the prediction, then claim it is prospective because the NEXT instance has not yet occurred. The prediction says "next G3 event" — but the G3 event that informed the prediction hypothesis already happened. No G3+ storms since April 4. Verdict stays pending.
